issues.title: Login page returns 500 error
issues.description: Users are unable to log in. The server returns a 500 Internal Server Error when submitting the login form.

issues.title: Update dashboard chart colors
issues.description: The current chart colors are hard to distinguish for colorblind users. Switch to an accessible palette.

issues.title: Add export to CSV feature
issues.description: Users need the ability to export their data as a CSV file from the reports page.

issues.title: Fix broken image on About page
issues.description: The team photo on the About page is showing a broken image icon. The file path may have changed.

issues.title: Implement password reset flow
issues.description: Users who forget their password currently have no way to reset it. Add email-based password reset.

issues.title: Optimize database queries on search
issues.description: Search endpoint is slow when filtering large datasets. Add proper indexing and query optimization.

issues.title: Update footer copyright year
issues.description: Footer still shows 2025. Update to dynamically display the current year.

issues.title: Add loading skeleton to user list
issues.description: Replace the spinner with a skeleton loader for a better perceived performance on the user list page.

issues.title: Mobile nav menu not closing on tap
issues.description: On mobile devices, tapping a nav link navigates but the hamburger menu stays open.

issues.title: Set up CI pipeline for PRs
issues.description: Configure GitHub Actions to run lint, type-check, and tests on every pull request.

issues.title: Refactor notification service
issues.description: The notification service has grown too large. Split into email, push, and in-app notification modules.

issues.title: Fix date picker timezone bug
issues.description: The date picker shows dates one day off for users in negative UTC offset timezones.
